_comment: Zone-partitioning rules for Stirrer B (rotor-stator). 4-zone canonical partition with a dedicated slot_exit zone capturing the high-shear region just outside each stator hole, where 80-95% of breakage occurs (Padron 2005, Hall 2011). The 'rotorZone' and 'slotExitZone' cellZones are created by snappyHexMesh from refinementRegions in snappyHexMeshDict. The selector evaluation order matters: slot_exit is matched before near_wall so that cells just outside stator holes are not double-counted as near-stator-wall.
